Enhancement","color":"fef2c0","default":false,"description":null}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":1,"created_at":"2024-08-30T19:52:30Z","updated_at":"2024-09-01T22:53:08Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"draft":false,"pull_request":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/pulls/27317","html_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/pull/27317","diff_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/pull/27317.diff","patch_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/pull/27317.patch","merged_at":null},"body":"### Improve Type Checking in `*stack` operations

#### Current Behavior
- Type checking in `*stack` operations (e.g., `numpy.stack`, `numpy.vstack`, `numpy.hstack`) is currently performed by checking if the input has the `__getitem__` attribute.
- This approach leads to unexpected behavior when the input is an array:
  - Example: `array([2,5,7])` is split into multiple single-element arrays: `(array([2]), array([5]), array([7]))`.

#### Proposed Change
- Enforce the input to be a sequence, as specified in the NumPy documentation: [numpy.stack](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/reference/generated/numpy.stack.html).

This prevents unintended splitting of array inputs, which can lead to confusion and poor performance in user code.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27317/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27317/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/comments/2323526611","html_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/pull/27317#issuecomment-2323526611","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27317","id":2323526611,"node_id":"IC_kwDOAA3dP86KfjPT","user":{"login":"akaashhazarika","id":16185446,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjE2MTg1NDQ2","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/16185446?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/akaashhazarika","html_url":"https://github.com/akaashhazarika","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/akaashhazarika/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/akaashhazarika/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/akaashhazarika/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/akaashhazarika/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/akaashhazarika/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/akaashhazarika/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/akaashhazarika/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/akaashhazarika/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/akaashhazarika/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-09-01T22:53:07Z","updated_at":"2024-09-01T22:53:07Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"Looks like some tests are failing with the proposed change.
